scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,swimmer -c blue,green,magenta npm:dev:api npm:dev:web npm:dev:swimmer
scripts.build: npm run build -w @swim/shared && npm run build -w @swim/api && npm run build -w @swim/web && npm run build -w @swim/swimmer
scripts.test: npm run test -w @swim/api && npm run test -w @swim/web && npm run test -w @swim/swimmer
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @swim/api && npm run lint -w @swim/web && npm run lint -w @swim/swimmer
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:up && npm run db:wait && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
